title: Manual-path interview forms (phase 4) + Right-now phase for all paths (phase 5)

impl.notes: Phase 4 manual path uses internal sub-steps ('about' → 'org' → 'review') managed by local state in PhaseFourManual. The sensitivity-check gate (orgAgreed state) resets on phase navigation away. The global Next button is hidden via hideNextButton when phase===4 && seedingPath==='manual' or phase===5 — both phases use an internal Confirm action that calls saveNow() then next(). saveNow cancels the debounce timer and writes immediately. normalizeAnswers() migrates old flat-string priorities from previous sessions. Bootstrap path shows a placeholder card (story 010 will replace). PhaseAbout was dead code in the pre-existing file and was removed during the rewrite.

verificationRun.result: PASS — JSON shows priorities as array of objects each with title/owner/dueDate keys; team (string), keyTools (array), openQuestions (string) also present
PASS — lines 958 and 971 match; line 971 is the rendered UI text inside the sensitivity-check panel
PASS — client and server build clean; onboarding bundle 37.15 kB client / 55.95 kB server

PASS — SSR renders phase 5 'Right now' correctly; three priority cards with Title/Owner/Due date sub-fields visible; hydration data shows priorities as objects with title/owner/dueDate; global Next button absent from nav (hideNextButton=true for phase 5)

userStory: As a user who chose the manual seeding path or as any user reaching phase 5, I want the wizard to collect my org context via interview forms and my current priorities via a shared form, so that context/me.md, context/org.md, and context/active.md can be scaffolded accurately.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Phase 4 (manual path) shows the About-you form with four fields: role, working style, team (free-text describing immediate team and headcount, new field), and key tools (list including which AI assistant and 3–4 enterprise tools, new field). These forms render only when `onboarding-state.json` shows `seedingPath: 'manual'`; seeded-path users see the Review & correct section cards (story 010) instead and the interview forms are skipped entirely.

Phase 4 (manual path) shows the Your-org form (stakeholders, glossary) behind a sensitivity-check confirmation panel displaying the exact phrase "no personnel data, unreleased roadmap items, or commercial terms" before saving org answers to disk. Clicking Cancel leaves onboarding-state.json org answers unchanged.

Phase 4 (manual path) ends with a review summary card showing all About-you and Your-org answers, with a 'Confirm' action and a 'Go back' link. Confirm triggers save-onboarding and advances to phase 5.

Phase 5 (both paths) captures each of the three priorities as an object with three sub-fields: title, owner (named person or role), and due date. After saving, `cat docs/data/local/onboarding-state.json` shows each priority as an object with keys title, owner, dueDate — not a plain string.
Phase 5 also captures a blockers field and an optional open-questions field. Phase 5 ends with a review summary card; Confirm triggers save-onboarding and advances to phase 6.

technicalNotes: Edit phase 4 and phase 5 components in `work-hq/src/routes/onboarding.tsx`. Phase 4 branches on `answers.seedingPath` read from onboarding-state.json (loaded on mount by story 001): value 'manual' → render About-you + Your-org forms; value 'bootstrap' → render is owned by story 010 (section cards). Extend the `Answers` type: add `team: string`, `keyTools: string[]` for phase 4 manual fields; change `priorities` from `[string, string, string]` to `Array<{ title: string; owner: string; dueDate: string }>` (3 entries); add `openQuestions: string`. Sensitivity-check wording must match the exact language in `AGENTS.md` §Sensitivity check standing order. Review summary cards: read state, display labelled list, Confirm calls save-onboarding then next().
outOfScope: Writing to context/*.md files (story 004), file-exists overwrite detection on second run (story 004), bootstrap-path section cards (story 010), state persistence infrastructure (story 001), wire-assistant phase (story 005).

verificationPlan.checks: After completing phase 5, JSON shows answers with team (string), keyTools (array), and priorities as an array of objects each with title/owner/dueDate keys.
Returns a line number match — confirms the sensitivity-check phrase is present in the phase 4 manual-path component.

revisionLog.change: Revised scope to MANUAL path of phase 4 and both-paths phase 5 (Right now); seeded-path users skip the interview forms; phase numbers updated throughout; deps updated to include story 009.
revisionLog.reason: ADR-P6-007 adds Glean-bootstrap seeding path and reorders wizard phases per amended ADR-P6-004.
